title: Assault on Health Minster Veena George: Accused moves Kerala HC to transfer probe to senior police officer
description: The Kerala High Court on Wednesday sought the State's response to a plea raising concerns about the fairness of the police probe into the attack on Health Minister Veena George at the Kannur railway station [Athul MC v State of Kerala & ors].The plea has been moved by one Athul MC, who is among those booked for assaulting George amid a black flag protest by student union activists against medical negligence incidents reported at the time in the State.
